accessDenied.message: Your account is not permitted to access SitHub. Please contact your administrator or try a different account.

itemGroups.emptyMessage: This area doesn't have any item groups configured yet.

items.unableToSaveNote: Unable to save note. Please try again.
items.filterSyntaxDescription: show only items having the filter keyword(s) in any of the equipment items;
items.filterSyntaxOr: multiple keywords are combined with OR;
items.filterSyntaxAnd: use plus sign to combine with AND;
items.filterSyntaxExact: use single or double quotation marks for exact matching;

bookings.unableToCancel: Unable to cancel booking. Please try again.

history.emptyMessage: No bookings were found in the selected date range. Try adjusting your filters.
